core_beliefs.belief: 量子假设——E=hν——微观世界不连续性
core_beliefs.explanation: 普朗克的量子假设是 20 世纪物理学最革命性的发现之一

core_beliefs.source: 新的科学真理不是通过说服反对者而是通过反对者死去而获胜
core_beliefs.explanation: 普朗克关于科学革命'代际更替'的核心观点

core_beliefs.belief: 科学家的革命性——即使保守者也能推动
core_beliefs.source: He was, by nature, a conservative mind... he did not flinch from announcing the most revolutionary idea which ever has shaken physics (Max Born)
core_beliefs.explanation: 普朗克本人保守但推动量子论革命,显示思想的独立性

core_beliefs.source: act of despair... I was ready to sacrifice any of my previous convictions about physics
core_beliefs.explanation: 量子假设是普朗克自认的'绝望之举',保留旧信念的反讽

core_beliefs.source: He called quanta 'the pennies of the atomic world'
core_beliefs.explanation: 量子是微观世界的基本单位,类比货币

core_beliefs.belief: 与爱因斯坦的友谊——科学+音乐
core_beliefs.source: Planck appointed Einstein to a professorship at Berlin (1914), and the two became close friends who met frequently to play music together
core_beliefs.explanation: 普朗克与爱因斯坦的友谊体现 20 世纪物理学家共同体的精神

core_beliefs.belief: 宗教与科学的统一——自然神论
core_beliefs.source: Both religion and science require a belief in God (1944)
core_beliefs.explanation: 普朗克晚年自然神论:神在科学终点

core_beliefs.belief: 纳粹时期坚守德国科学
core_beliefs.source: Planck met Hitler (1933) trying to save German science, but failed
core_beliefs.explanation: 普朗克在纳粹时期坚守德国科学,但儿子 Erwin 仍被处死
